name: dqx-en
_comment: Mirrors upstream dqxclarity's PatchService. Assets are GitHub 'latest release' redirects (no API/auth). 'target' is relative to the install root (the 'DRAGON QUEST X' dir). No checksums published upstream, so sha256/size are omitted; the engine downloads and compares against the installed file for idempotency.

game_files.description: Translated UI/menu/system text (data00000000 archive). Main static translation.

config_exe.description: Translated DQXConfig.exe (config tool). Runs under Wine.

launcher_exe.description: Translated DQXLauncher.exe (boot launcher). Runs under Wine.
